text.title: Performance Testing Basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the service have latency SLOs AND known hot paths AND ≥10 RPS?

text.example: Hot path /api/v1/checkout p95 380ms vs SLO 300ms → profile py-spy → 60% time in JSON serialisation → switch to orjson → re-run k6 → p95 240ms → CI gate at 270ms.
